title: Black Jack
writer: Luigi Ambrosini, Augusto Finocchi, Gianfranco Baldanello
actors: Robert Woods, Lucienne Bridou, Rik Battaglia
plot: Following the robbery of a bank in the Wild West a gang gathers around Jack Murphy, their leader. Things go awry when Skinner, Reb, Mathias and the brothers, Bill and Gordon, realize Jack will divide the loot for his own good only...
